user_prompt: Morphix职责切分reskin:图#1=真素材拼装布局稿(只留布局/文字/位置)+图#2=真实养成手册界面(design system整套抄),AI合成统一成品效果图;新元素(双档切换栏+封顶宽格)按图#2风格渲染

params.prompt:
I am providing TWO reference images. This is a complete visual style transfer task.

Reference image #1 = LAYOUT & CONTENT SOURCE. From image #1 extract ONLY: the structural arrangement (where each element sits, overall composition), the text labels and what they say, what each icon represents semantically, and the positions of every control (the two-tab switch, buttons, the day-reward cells, the wide finale cell). DISCARD EVERYTHING ELSE about image #1: its background color, panel color, border style, button shapes/colors, toggle style, frame decorations, font, palette, icon rendering — every visual aspect of image #1 must be ERASED. Only the WHAT and WHERE survives, never the HOW IT LOOKS.

Reference image #2 = COMPLETE VISUAL STYLE SOURCE (the real game's '英雄养成手册' screen). Copy EVERY visual aspect onto the output: the warm wooden background, the aged parchment binder panel with hole-punches and torn gold-brown edges and ship-wheel watermark, the gold-framed reward cells (gold for unlocked, dark-brown with a small lock for locked), the open treasure-chest key art, the red '9600%' badge, the gold price button, section typography, gold metal trims/bevels, divider style, and the whole color palette. Treat image #2 as the design system.

Image #1 contains TWO NEW elements NOT present in image #2 — render them natively in image #2's visual language:
(a) a horizontal TWO-TAB segmented SWITCH sitting in the panel's top header strip: left tab '基础版 $29.99', right tab '豪华版 $49.99' with an emphasized glowing red '×2 奖励' badge; make it a wood-and-gold segmented control inset into the parchment header, the active tab highlighted.
(b) a FULL-WIDTH '满勤封顶大奖' finale cell at the bottom of the day grid — render it as a wide version of image #2's gold reward cell with a premium gold/purple glow.

X3 CONSTRAINTS: NEVER a painterly or brush-stroke look — crisp, sharp game-UI rendering only. For gold/wood ornaments follow image #2's repertoire (gold metal trim, beveled frames, parchment grain), do not collapse to a single ornament. Keep ALL Chinese text labels exactly as in image #1 (title 英雄养成手册, countdown, 第N天 day labels, ×quantities, button prices).

Goal: output looks 100% like a screen made by the artist of image #2, redrawn from scratch in their style, but with the layout and content of image #1. Output: clean vertical portrait mobile activity panel, sharp fonts and icons, high resolution.
